steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The underlined portion explains that standard dyeing would 'run counter to the ecological promise' of sustainable pellicles — it names a problem that drove researchers to pursue an alternative coloring approach. The question asks what function this underlined portion serves.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — describes how they solved the problem: the underlined portion identifies the problem, not the solution. ✗
  • Choice B — shows a comparison between two dyeing methods: no comparison is made; only the drawback of standard dyeing is stated. ✗
  • Choice C — explains the ecological benefits of pellicles: the underlined portion is about a dyeing problem, not pellicle benefits generally. ✗
  • Choice D — presents a problem that motivated an alternative approach: the underlined portion states the obstacle (standard dyeing undermines sustainability) that led researchers to seek a different coloring method. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
